phases.name: Pre-Alpha
phases.description: The pre-alpha phase of the Nominate-AI project ecosystem saw the creation of several foundational tools and platforms. These early projects focused on building core functionality and laying the groundwork for more advanced features to come.

phases.name: Development Phase: Refining Core Services and Prototyping
phases.description: The development phase involves refining core services, such as pipeline scripts and service setup (maild), updating the user interface with comprehensive documentation (maild-ui), fixing URL encoding and improving error handling in Gmail IMAP connection (maild-exec), creating a web application for pocket field kit (pocket), and prototyping deep lake monster concepts (lochness). Additionally, this phase includes adding complete conversion documentation and batch processing tools to cryptid and achieving production-ready systems with high success rates through mog.

phases.name: Development Phase: Core Infrastructure
phases.description: This phase represents the creation of core infrastructure projects that provide a solid foundation for the Nominate-AI project ecosystem. It includes the development of comprehensive testing infrastructure and documentation, as well as the establishment of TypeScript and Python foundations.

milestones.title: Seedbed (Python) - Comprehensive testing infrastructure and documentation

phases.name: Initial Development
phases.description: Laid the groundwork for the Nominate-AI project ecosystem, setting up basic architecture and building blocks.

phases.name: Phase 5
phases.description: Development of cbmodels, cbradio, cbsurveys and 4 more repos.

phases.name: Phase 6
phases.description: Development of cbintel, cbproject, cbauth and 4 more repos.

phases.name: Alpha Development Phase
phases.description: The alpha development phase saw the creation of several key modules and APIs, including an unstructured document processing API, a wireless routing infrastructure for distributed TOR operations, and various tools for email client integration and document indexing. These components laid the groundwork for future AI-powered features in Campaign Brain web applications.

milestones.title: Unstructured Document Processing API - FastAPI wrapper for the unstructured library
WireGuard-to-TOR tunnel infrastructure for distributed TOR routing
Wireless routing infrastructure for distributed TOR operations
Automated user guide generator for Campaign Brain web applications
Headless email client API for IMAP/SMTP operations
FastAPI wrapper for PageIndex - vectorless RAG document indexing with workspace management
CartoDB tile caching proxy with look-ahead prefetching

phases.name: Phase 8
phases.description: Development of cbgeo, cbmaps, cbcli and 4 more repos.

phases.name: Initial Setup
phases.description: The Nominate-AI project ecosystem was established with the creation of seven core repositories, laying the groundwork for a distributed system that will manage campaign data and provide various services.

milestones.title: Campaign Brain System Manager - Distributed monitoring and self-healing infrastructure
The cbwebhook repository is a Python-based webhook ingestion service.
Issue tracking dashboard built with Python, aiming to provide a centralized system for managing and tracking issues.
Real-time system health and activity monitoring dashboard
VPN Cluster Management API - Geographic routing through OpenWRT workers
Online payment system with recent commits focused on improving documentation, adding new features, and enhancing user experience.
API access layer for social media accounts

phases.name: Internal Infrastructure Development
phases.description: During this period, the Nominate-AI project ecosystem saw the creation of various internal infrastructure tools and services. These included the MCP server for LLM agents, a CLI toolkit for managing OpenWRT VPN/Tor networks, executive summaries, an internal radio advertising rate management tool, a business intelligence dashboard, an email integration service, and a financial dashboard application.

milestones.title: RCI-Frontend - internal radio advertising rate management tool creation
cbpulse-ui - VIP business intelligence dashboard creation

phases.name: Campaign Brain Platform
phases.description: The development phase focused on building the core components of the Campaign Brain platform, including user interfaces, APIs, and backend services. The platforms were designed to work together seamlessly, enabling efficient campaign management and media buying. This phase laid the groundwork for the subsequent development of AI-powered tools and features.

milestones.title: Initial commit of cbradio-ui and cbrouter

phases.name: Campaign Brain Development Phase
phases.description: This development phase represents the creation of core infrastructure and services for Campaign Brain, including data center setup, API wrappers, and user guides. The phase also includes the initial release of the CBQA CLI tool. This marks a critical milestone in the deployment of Campaign Brain's services.

milestones.title: cbtts (Python) - Campaign Brain TTS service wrapping VibeVoice-Realtime-0.5B
cbdc (Shell) - Campaign Brain data center infrastructure
cbqa (Python) - Initial CBQA CLI with full DC1 regression results
cbairtable (Python) - Multi-tenant Airtable API wrapper with DuckDB sync
cbiterable (Python) - Multi-tenant Iterable API wrapper with DuckDB sync
cbhandbook (Unknown) - User guides and ops handbooks for Campaign Brain services

phases.name: Infrastructure Development Phase
phases.description: This phase focuses on building the underlying infrastructure for the Nominate-AI project ecosystem, including the Campaign Brain AI-powered task management and scheduling tool, Infrastructure Standards & Updates, and Operations Dashboard.

milestones.title: cbea (Campaign Brain AI-powered task management and scheduling tool) created
cbinferfrasays (Infra Says — Campaign Brain Infrastructure Standards & Updates) created

repos.name: cbapp
repos.description: The cbapp repository appears to be a Python-based project that has undergone significant updates and refactoring, including domain migrations, API additions, and feature enhancements. Recent commits have focused on improving the user interface, adding new features such as Typeform integration, and fixing bugs. The repository is now in a state of active development.

repos.description: Internal tool for managing political radio advertising rates across 1,900+ radio stations with advanced filtering, QA workflows, and rate management capabilities · Built with Manus

repos.name: cbfiles
repos.description: The cbfiles repository appears to be a Python project that provides various features for image and video processing, including vision inference, search, and media asset management. Recent commits have focused on improving performance, adding new features such as HEIC support, and enhancing compatibility with different platforms. The repository has also undergone domain migrations and refactorings.

repos.name: cbos
repos.description: The cbos repository appears to be a Python project that has undergone significant development and maintenance over several months, with recent commits focusing on improving code quality, adding new features, and updating dependencies. The repository has seen multiple major releases (v0.3.1, v0.4.0, v0.5.0) and several minor updates, indicating a steady pace of development and refinement. Overall, the project seems to be centered around building a mesh-based system with various features and tools.
